blocks.body: Future Perfect: Negatives — will not have + V3 dla czynności, które nadal nie będą zakończone do określonego momentu w przyszłości.

{"level":"B1–B2","intro":"Aby zbudować przeczenie w Future Perfect, używamy will not have + V3 albo krótkiej formy won't have + V3.","rules":[{"label":"Negative form","color":"emerald","text":"Podstawowy wzór to subject + will not have + V3.","example":"I will not have finished by 6 p.m."},{"label":"Won't have","color":"blue","text":"W mowie i zwykłym piśmie bardzo często używamy won't have.","example":"She won't have packed by tomorrow morning."},{"label":"Not complete by then","color":"amber","text":"To pokazuje, że czynność wciąż nie będzie zakończona do tego przyszłego momentu.","example":"They won't have solved the problem by Friday."}]}

{"title":"1. Jak budujemy przeczenia","intro":"Forma nie zmienia się zależnie od podmiotu. Zmienia się tylko przeczenie po will.","items":[{"label":"Full form","title":"will not have + V3","subtitle":"He will not have finished the task by noon."},{"label":"Short form","title":"won't have + V3","subtitle":"We won't have saved enough money by summer."},{"label":"All subjects","title":"I / you / he / she / it / we / they","subtitle":"Struktura jest taka sama w każdym przypadku."},{"label":"Meaning","title":"not completed by then","subtitle":"Rezultat nadal nie będzie gotowy do tego momentu."}]}

{"title":"2. Kiedy przeczenia są potrzebne","sections":[{"label":"Nie do deadline'u","color":"emerald","description":"Pokaż, że czynność nadal nie będzie zakończona do określonej godziny, daty albo deadline'u.","examples":[{"en":"By Friday, we won't have finished the report.","ua":"Praca nadal nie będzie gotowa do piątku."},{"en":"By tomorrow evening, she won't have packed everything.","ua":"Do tego czasu rezultat nadal się nie pojawi."}]},{"label":"Nie przed innym przyszłym wydarzeniem","color":"blue","description":"Ta forma działa, gdy jedna czynność nadal nie będzie zakończona przed innym przyszłym wydarzeniem.","examples":[{"en":"By the time you arrive, I won't have cleaned the kitchen.","ua":"Twój przyjazd nastąpi wcześniej niż zakończenie czynności."},{"en":"They won't have solved the problem before the meeting starts.","ua":"Rezultat nadal nie będzie gotowy przed drugim wydarzeniem."}]},{"label":"Opóźnienia i niezakończone plany","color":"amber","description":"Używaj jej przy zadaniach, które nie zmieszczą się w planie albo harmonogramie.","examples":[{"en":"The team won't have completed the app by next month.","ua":"Plan zakończenia się opóźnia."},{"en":"He won't have saved enough money by summer.","ua":"Do lata potrzebny rezultat nadal nie będzie gotowy."}]},{"label":"Wciąż bez rezultatu","color":"violet","description":"Forma przecząca jest przydatna, gdy chcesz podkreślić brak gotowego rezultatu do przyszłego punktu.","examples":[{"en":"By then, we won't have received the documents.","ua":"Dokumentów nadal nie będzie do tego momentu."},{"en":"She won't have learned all the irregular verbs by next week.","ua":"Nauka nadal nie da potrzebnego rezultatu."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Typowe negative patterns","intro":"Spójrz na najczęstsze modele.","rows":[{"en":"I won't have finished by 6 p.m.","ua":"won't have finished","note":"rezultat nadal nie będzie gotowy"},{"en":"She will not have left before the meeting.","ua":"will not have left","note":"pełna forma brzmi bardziej formalnie"},{"en":"We won't have built the website by next week.","ua":"won't have built","note":"niezakończony plan do deadline'u"},{"en":"By then, they won't have learned enough.","ua":"won't have learned","note":"do tego momentu rezultat nadal nie będzie wystarczający"}],"warning":"Po won't have używamy V3, a nie podstawowej formy czasownika."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Używanie has po won't.","wrong":"❌ She won't has finished by noon.","right":"✅ She won't have finished by noon."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Używanie V1 zamiast V3.","wrong":"❌ We won't have finish the task by Friday.","right":"✅ We won't have finished the task by Friday."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Wstawianie not po have.","wrong":"❌ They will have not completed the work by then.","right":"✅ They will not have completed the work by then."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Przeczenia w Future Perfect = will not have + V3.","Krótka forma: won't have + V3.","Ta forma pokazuje, że czynność nadal nie będzie zakończona do określonego przyszłego momentu albo wydarzenia.","Po won't have zawsze używamy V3."]}
